final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰, structured as a 文博图鉴 exploded-view reference plate.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 aesthetic — exact illustration technique and rendering finish are yours
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧: 结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
Subject: must include a full-body standing figure (真实人物全身站姿) as the central subject, wearing a complete 中国少数民族服饰 — model selects the most representative ethnic group and garment system; all key components, structural layers, material differences, and cultural details must be present
Scene/backdrop: must be a paper-texture background in 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 tones, evoking a museum exhibition panel
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, scholarly, archival atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a restrained, high-quality 文博 direction anchored by the garment's authentic ethnic color system — exact palette ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs authentic textile surface rendering (织物、刺绣、染料、金属配饰等真实质感) — exact grain and sheen level are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文 — labels, callout lines, material notes, pattern meanings, color interpretations, and summary text must all be 简体中文, clear and legible; no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve accurate ethnic garment structure and cultural accuracy; all in-image text must be 简体中文 only; layout panels must all be populated with real annotated content; figure or object must be rendered in a realistic, non-stylized manner consistent with 文博图鉴 standards
Avoid: 海报感 / 影楼感 / 电商感 / 动漫感 / cosplay感 / 过度装饰 / 乱标注 / 错结构 / 糊字 / 假材质
